---
id: send
title: "Send a signal to all subscribers."
description: "The signal is sent to all processes that are streaming the signal at `GET /signals/{signal}`."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Send a signal to all subscribers."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/signals/{signal}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The signal is sent to all processes that are streaming the signal at `GET /signals/{signal}`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
